subcodes.first_line: The Pen speedeth forth at every moment, from the presence of the Ancient King, in the arena of wisdom and utterance, as a bounty from God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یسرع القلم من لدن مالک القدم فی کل الاحیان فی مضمار الحکمه و البیان فضلا من الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @development of capacity and readiness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
